ab: kai taisadrasadra nai, tadrosa nai ka takali ka ababay si konako mwlrika’e ki agi ki tamali ikai Balangaw.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: mwbeleng kisiya nai twalai Taipake na kala Balrangaw.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: sa kelanganai Balrangaw, ko agi ki tamali ango sidosiya si kela kisiya kidreseng naiya.
ch: 到了台東，叔叔開車來火車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: kadro wadayli kodaana ki gai ki tamali, ’lo angota sidosiya ’adalro wakelata.
ch: 車站離叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle's house, and it's just a short drive away.

ab: kodaana ki agi ki tamali sa’agiyagisi yakai ka madraw ka tala’ola’owa ki golagolay, ango ’aliliding nai mwa tala’ola’owa ki golagolay.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle's house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: ikainai iniya, ko agi ki tamali iloko naiya walomo bo’a’e si mobeleng ki baa.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: sa amaong, maelrelrenai mwa maci kwane sa aga.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: lo ikai maci makalra ka sidosiya, amanisa ango nai ’otobay mwa kawai.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: sa amwadadavace nai, la kidringai ’otobaiyanai ki’akotrakilinga, la mobelengnai baase si davace mobaliyo.
ch: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: wa mobaliyonganai kela Taipake kaiyasa, kadro thingale idra kidringainga ’otobay ki agi ki tamali amiyanai kidremedreme.
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don't know if my uncle's motorcycle has been found.
